mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SUGGESTION ( ID, SUGGESTION_TITLE, IS_ADDED_LIST, CHECKLIST_ID, MEMBER_ID, PROJECT_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_SUGGESTION.NEXTVAL, #{suggestionTitle}, 'N', #{checklistId}, #{memberId}, #{projectId} )
mapper.select: SELECT S.ID AS id, S.SUGGESTION_TITLE AS suggestionTitle, S.IS_ADDED_LIST AS isAddedList, S.CHECKLIST_ID AS checklistId, S.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, S.PROJECT_ID AS projectId, M.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, M.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS memberProfileImageUrl FROM TBL_SUGGESTION S JOIN TBL_MEMBER M ON S.MEMBER_ID = M.ID WHERE S.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY S.ID DESC
